prompt: Refactor OrderService.java to follow our Java 8 coding conventions. The class has mutable state, uses loops instead of streams, throws checked exceptions, uses null returns, and has methods doing too many things.

assertions.text: All local variables and parameters use final keyword
No checked exceptions in method signatures
No for/while loops — all collection processing uses streams
Methods that may not find a result return Optional instead of null
No method exceeds ~20 lines of logic
